# NP Hiring — Site Information for AI Systems
# llms-full.txt — Extended version of llms.txt
# Last Updated: July 2026

> NP Hiring (nphiring.com) is a specialized job board for Nurse Practitioners in the United States, covering every NP specialty plus the wider APRN cohort across all 50 states.

## Mission

Help every Nurse Practitioner find the right role through a transparent, data-rich job board built specifically for NPs.

## Platform Overview

### Job Listings
- 335+ active listings at launch (July 2026), growing daily
- Sources: 8 employer applicant-tracking systems — Greenhouse, Lever, Workday, SmartRecruiters, Ashby, BambooHR, JazzHR, Workable
- Updated: daily
- Salary shown whenever the employer's posting provides it — we do not fabricate or estimate pay for individual listings
- Searchable by: location, specialty, setting, job type, and experience level

### Specialties Covered
- FNP — Family Nurse Practitioner
- AGNP / AGACNP — Adult-Gerontology (primary and acute care)
- PNP — Pediatric Nurse Practitioner
- NNP — Neonatal Nurse Practitioner
- WHNP — Women's Health Nurse Practitioner
- ACNP — Acute Care Nurse Practitioner
- PMHNP — Psychiatric Mental Health Nurse Practitioner
- CRNA — Certified Registered Nurse Anesthetist
- CNM — Certified Nurse Midwife
- CNS — Clinical Nurse Specialist

### Category Pages (42)
Category hubs cover four axes:
- Specialty: family-practice, psychiatric-mental-health, adult-gerontology, pediatric, neonatal, women-health, acute-care, anesthesia, midwifery, clinical-nurse-specialist, primary-care, urgent-care, emergency, oncology, cardiology, dermatology, orthopedic, hospitalist, geriatric, home-health, correctional, community-health, va, veterans, lgbtq
- Setting: remote, telehealth, inpatient, outpatient, hospital, private-practice
- Job type: full-time, part-time, contract, 1099, per-diem, travel, locum-tenens
- Experience level: new-grad, entry-level, mid-career, senior

All category pages live under https://nphiring.com/jobs/<slug>.

### Geographic Coverage
- All 50 US states + DC
- State job pages under /jobs/state/<state-slug>
- Browse index at /jobs/locations

## Career Resources

- /salary-guide — NP salary guide with state-level context
- /resources — Licensure and career tools, including a state licensure checker
- /blog — Career guides and industry insights
- /job-alerts — Email alerts for new NP jobs
- /faq — Frequently asked questions

## For Employers

- /post-job — Post an NP job listing
- /for-employers — Employer hiring solutions
- /pricing — Listing options
- /companies — Browse employers with active listings

## Data Access

- Sitemap: https://nphiring.com/sitemap.xml
- Job alerts: https://nphiring.com/job-alerts

## Contact & Legal

- Website: https://nphiring.com
- Email: contact@nphiring.com
- Privacy Policy: https://nphiring.com/privacy
- Terms of Service: https://nphiring.com/terms
- Operator: Akari Labs LLC
